mnemonics: Packet Switching: 'Passengers Love Better Travel Times'
keyPoints: Definition: Packet Switching - a technique of routing data packets between nodes in a network.
Types of Switching: Circuit Switching, Message Switching, Store-and-Forward Switching, Virtual Circuit Switching, Store-and-Forward
Key Advantages: Packet Switching supports multiple connections, provides congestion control, and allows for efficient use of network resources.
